instruction: A two-dimensional matrix should encode value by color.
instructions:
Heatmap matrix. Config: xField, yField cats; colorField=measure; meta type cat.
Polish: color MUST be a hex array (e.g. ["#B8E1FF", "#5B8FF9", "#00318A"]); never color: { type: "sequential" }. Legend bottom; element-active; readable axis ticks; tooltip with value. Apply Excel format strings to measure tooltip/legend when provided.
